2024-04-17T10:08:00.CONTENT_EN: Transport Department has received notification from MTR Corporation Limited that there is an additional travelling time of 10 to 15 minutes on the Tsuen Wan Line between Central and Tsuen Wan because of a technical fault on a train at Cheung Sha Wan Station.
2024-04-17T10:08:00.CONTENT_CN: 運輸署接獲港鐵公司通知，由於長沙灣站有列車機件故障，荃灣綫來往中環至荃灣的車程延長10至15分鐘。

2024-04-17T10:12:00.CONTENT_EN:
Extra travelling time can be expected on the Tsuen Wan Line. 
Please allow more time for travel.
2024-04-17T10:12:00.CONTENT_CN:
荃灣綫列車預計需要額外行車時間， 
請為行程預留充裕時間。

2024-04-17T10:16:00.CONTENT_EN:
Due to an equipment fault on a train at Cheung Sha Wan Station, the total journey time on the Tsuen Wan Line between Central Station and Tsuen Wan Station could be extended by 15-20 minutes. Please consider using other transport. Longer waiting times on Tsuen Wan Line platforms can be expected. 
Please allow more time for travel.
2024-04-17T10:16:00.CONTENT_CN:
由於有列車在長沙灣站出現設備故障，荃灣綫來往中環站及荃灣站的行車時間預計需要額外15-20分鐘。 請考慮使用其他交通工具。現時荃灣綫月台上的乘客較多，候車時間亦會較長。 
請為行程預留充裕時間。

2024-04-17T10:28:00.CONTENT_EN: The Tsuen Wan Line train which could not be operated at Cheung Sha Wan Station has now been removed. Normal train service is gradually resuming.
2024-04-17T10:28:00.CONTENT_CN: 在長沙灣站出現故障的列車已被移離行車綫，荃灣綫列車服務逐步回復正常。
